title: No More Sleep Problems
description: Trouble finding sleep in multiplayer? Simply reduce the number of players required to skip the night!
body:
Decide how many players are needed to skip the night with this small mod!

## Features:
- Night skipping if a certain percentage of all players in the overworld is sleeping (configurable)
- Exclude players from the total amount if they are mining (meaning: below a certain Y-level) (configurable)
- Configurable chat messages when a player is going to bed or leaving the bed
- Configurable chat message when the night is skipped (supports defining messages for certain dates in the year)
